name: punchwall-mobile-controls
description: Validate Android/iOS touch buttons exist and drive Train, Punch, and Use actions through the live UI.

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local gui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui"):WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD", 5)
local frame = gui:WaitForChild("MobileControls", 5)
assert(frame, "missing MobileControls")
frame.Visible = true
local result = { visible = frame.Visible }
for _, name in ipairs({ "ActionPunch", "ActionTrain", "ActionUse" }) do
	local button = frame:FindFirstChild(name)
	result[name] = button and button.Text or "missing"
end
return HttpService:JSONEncode(result)

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation", 5)
assert(command, "missing PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("Reset")
local player = Players:GetPlayers()[1]
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = CFrame.new(-53, 7, 13)
local snapshot = command:Invoke("Snapshot")
snapshot.PositionedNear = "Power Bag"
return HttpService:JSONEncode(snapshot)

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("Reset")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { Power = 15, Coins = 0, WallLevel = 1, CritChance = 0, FistMultiplier = 1, PetMultiplier = 0 })
local player = Players:GetPlayers()[1]
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2, 7, -20), Vector3.new(-2, 7, -40))
local snapshot = command:Invoke("Snapshot")
snapshot.PositionedNear = "Front Depth Block"
return HttpService:JSONEncode(snapshot)

steps.label: mobile punch breaks one shared depth block

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("Reset")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { Coins = 300, FistMultiplier = 1, BreakSpeed = 1, EquippedFist = "Starter Glove" })
local player = Players:GetPlayers()[1]
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = CFrame.new(-60, 7, -10)
local snapshot = command:Invoke("Snapshot")
snapshot.PositionedNear = "Boxing Glove Stand"
return HttpService:JSONEncode(snapshot)
